name: resume-job-agent
description: Local resume tailoring app that finds public job descriptions without job-board APIs.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/resumeParser.js && node --check src/tailor.js && node --check src/llm.js && node --check src/jobIndex/sourceDefinitions.js && node --check src/jobIndex/utils.js && node --check src/jobIndex/pageFetcher.js && node --check src/jobIndex/searchPlanner.js && node --check src/jobIndex/database.js && node --check src/jobIndex/adapters.js && node --check src/jobIndex/indexer.js && node --check src/jobIndex/matching.test.js
